\tzpentry{ID11424}{S5 Mode Density Scaling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For S5, mode density scales as R to the minus sixth.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\rho_{S^{5}}\sim R^{-6}
